text:
# Five working days before The bundle (except any preliminary

documents that are not yet available) must
be sent to the other parties and sent to the
court by the person responsible for
preparing it.
By 11am on the working day before the Any preliminary documents (such as a case
hearing summary, statement of issues or
chronology), if not already sent, must be
sent to all other parties and sent to the
court.
